title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at SRL Diagnostics

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at SRL Diagnostics
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? SRL Diagnostics in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SRL Diagnostics:
SRL Diagnostics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics!
